_meta.engine: Google Accessibility Test Framework for Android (ATF)
_meta.provenance: INFORMATIVE / vendor-derived. WCAG 2.x was authored for the web; ATF-check -> WCAG-SC mappings are this project's best-effort bridge (cf. W3C 'Mobile Accessibility: How WCAG Applies to Mobile'). They are NOT normative. Only ATF results at severity ERROR become 'fail' findings; WARNING/INFO and all screen-reader-dependent behaviour route to 'Needs Manual Review' (TalkBack pass).
_meta.note: Keys starting with '_' are ignored by the normalizer. Some checks map to multiple SCs; the PRIMARY SC is used for the row, others noted in _secondary.
